name: CLX - MGA Insurance Content Library Seed v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET auth. Idempotent. Seeds insurance-specific content topic templates.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.item.json.body || {};
const expected = process.env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET || '';
if (!body.internal_secret || body.internal_secret !== expected) return { json: { _unauthorized: true, status: 401 } };
const rows = [
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'life_insurance_basics', topic_title: 'Term vs. Whole Life: which fits a young family?', target_audience: 'young_families', topic_summary: 'Compares term and whole life from a cost/coverage tradeoff lens.', call_to_action: 'Book a 15-min coverage review.', educational_value: 'high', seo_keywords: ['term life', 'whole life', 'young family insurance'] },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'life_insurance_basics', topic_title: 'How much life insurance do you actually need?', target_audience: 'young_families', topic_summary: 'Walks through the income-replacement + mortgage + dependents math.', call_to_action: 'Try the needs calculator.', educational_value: 'high', seo_keywords: ['life insurance needs', 'coverage calculator'] },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'life_insurance_basics', topic_title: 'Common misconceptions about life insurance', target_audience: 'first_time_buyers', topic_summary: 'Myth-busting around price, underwriting, and payout reliability.' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'critical_illness', topic_title: 'Critical illness insurance — what people get wrong', target_audience: 'young_families', topic_summary: 'Clarifies what CI does and does not cover. Includes claim examples.' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'critical_illness', topic_title: 'When does critical illness make sense?', target_audience: 'business_owners' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'disability', topic_title: 'Disability insurance for self-employed', target_audience: 'business_owners', topic_summary: 'Own-occupation vs. any-occupation, waiting periods, benefit periods.' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'disability', topic_title: 'How disability insurance protects your income', target_audience: 'young_families' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'estate_planning', topic_title: 'Insurance as an estate-planning tool', target_audience: 'high_net_worth' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'estate_planning', topic_title: 'Tax-efficient legacy strategies', target_audience: 'high_net_worth' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'business_insurance', topic_title: 'Key person insurance — what is it really?', target_audience: 'business_owners' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'business_insurance', topic_title: 'Buy-sell agreements explained', target_audience: 'business_owners' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'mortgage_protection', topic_title: 'Mortgage life: the trap most homeowners miss', target_audience: 'young_families' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'mortgage_protection', topic_title: 'Personally-owned coverage vs. bank mortgage insurance', target_audience: 'first_time_buyers' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'retirement', topic_title: 'Using whole life for tax-advantaged retirement income', target_audience: 'high_net_worth' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'retirement', topic_title: 'Insurance + RRSP + TFSA: how they fit together', target_audience: 'young_families' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'health_benefits', topic_title: 'Travel insurance: what to look for', target_audience: 'seniors' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'health_benefits', topic_title: 'Group benefits for small businesses', target_audience: 'business_owners' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'life_insurance_basics', topic_title: 'Smoker vs. non-smoker pricing — the truth', target_audience: 'first_time_buyers' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'life_insurance_basics', topic_title: 'Why your age matters for premiums', target_audience: 'young_families' },
  { vertical_id: 'insurance', topic_category: 'life_insurance_basics', topic_title: 'What happens if you miss a premium payment?', target_audience: 'first_time_buyers' }
];
return { json: { _authorized: true, rows } };
return { json: { ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', templates_seeded: ($('Build Seeds').first().json.rows || []).length } };
